description:
Backlog anchor: `packages/pi-om-extension/docs/mastra-parity-backlog.md` → **Tier 1 / section 4. Prompt and output-structure upgrades for specificity preservation**.

Goal: add regressions that fail when OM output flattens lists, loses exact numbers/counts, merges distinct items, or drops key constraints.

Relevant test surfaces:
- `packages/pi-om-extension/src/__tests__/integration/observation-cycle-reflection.test.ts`
- `packages/pi-om-extension/src/__tests__/unit/parse-observer-output.test.ts`
- `packages/pi-om-extension/src/__tests__/unit/engine-build-context.test.ts`
- any new scenario tests under `packages/pi-om-extension/src/__tests__/integration`

Worker notes:
- include technical examples with file paths, commands, rejected alternatives, and distinguishing attributes
- test observer and reflector behavior together where possible
- prefer assertions that demonstrate practical recoverability of the original detail
title: Add regression coverage for list, number, and constraint preservation in OM output
